zh.Kalundborg, Vor Frue, Ars, Holbæk, Danma: 丹麥霍爾ae可阿爾斯沃 福盧卡倫德波格
zh.lifeSummary: Strange Ulfeldt是Marskal Strange Ulfeldt和Gro n.n.的兒子，於1144年出生在丹麥霍爾ae可阿爾斯沃 福盧卡倫德波格。他於1169年與Ukendt在丹麥霍爾ae可阿爾斯沃 福盧卡倫德波格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1186年在丹麥享年42歲。

zh-hans.Kalundborg, Vor Frue, Ars, Holbæk, Danma: 丹麦霍爾ae可阿爾斯沃 福盧卡倫德波格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Strange Ulfeldt是Marskal Strange Ulfeldt和Gro n.n.的儿子，于1144年出生在丹麦霍爾ae可阿爾斯沃 福盧卡倫德波格。他于1169年与Ukendt在丹麦霍爾ae可阿爾斯沃 福盧卡倫德波格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1186年在丹麦享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Strange
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Gloucestershire): nickname for a newcomer to a district, from Middle English strange ‘foreign’ (Old French estrange, Latin extraneus, from extra ‘outside’).

Irish (Antrim): this name is also common in Ireland, where, in addition to its English etymology, it may represent an Anglicized form of any of several Irish names containing the element gall ‘stranger’, e.g. Doyle , Gallagher .

variants.name: Stranger
meanings: English: nickname for a newcomer to an area, from Middle English stra(u)nger(e) ‘stranger, foreigner’ (Old French estrangier). Compare Strange .

variants.name: Doyle
meanings: Mainly U.S.: transferred use of the Irish surname, Anglicized form of Ó Dubhghaill ‘descendant of Dubhghall’, from dubh ‘black’, ‘dark’ + gall ‘stranger’ ( compare Dougal ). This was used as a byname for Scandinavians, in particular to distinguish the darker‐haired Danes from fair‐haired Norwegians.

variants.name: Lestrange
meanings: Irish and English: variant of Strange 1 with fused Old French definite article le.

Irish: in Ireland, adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche ‘son of Cúchoigcriche’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the borderland’. Lestrange was adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche probably due to the presence of a prominent family of Lestrange, of similar meaning, who settled in the counties of Westmeath and Offaly in the 16th century.

en.lifeSummary: Strange Ulfeldt was born in 1144, in Kalundborg, Vor Frue, Ars, Holbæk, Denmark as the son of Marskal Strange Ulfeldt and Gro n.n.. He married Ukendt in 1169, in Kalundborg, Vor Frue, Ars, Holbæk, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1186, in Denmark, at the age of 42.

ja.Kalundborg, Vor Frue, Ars, Holbæk, Danma: デンマークホールブaeクアルズボー フルカルンドボルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Strange Ulfeldtは1144年にデンマークホールブaeクアルズボー フルカルンドボルグでMarskal Strange UlfeldtとGro n.n.の息子として生まれた。1169年にデンマークホールブaeクアルズボー フルカルンドボルグでUkendtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1186年にデンマークで42歳で死去した。

ko.Kalundborg, Vor Frue, Ars, Holbæk, Danma: 덴마크 홀브ae크 아스 보르 프루 캘런드볼그
ko.lifeSummary: Strange Ulfeldt(은)는 1144년 덴마크 홀브ae크 아스 보르 프루 캘런드볼그에서 Marskal Strange Ulfeldt(와)과 Gro n.n.의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1169년 덴마크 홀브ae크 아스 보르 프루 캘런드볼그에서 Ukendt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1186년 덴마크에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Kalundborg, Vor Frue, Ars, Holbæk, Danma: калундборг, фор фру, арс, холбaeк, Дания
ru.lifeSummary: Strange Ulfeldt родился в 1144 г. в местности калундборг, фор фру, арс, холбaeк, Дания. Его родителей звали Marskal Strange Ulfeldt и Gro n.n. Он женился на женщине по имени Ukendt в 1169 г. в местности калундборг, фор фру, арс, холбaeк, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1186 г. в местности Дания в возрасте 42 лет.
